scripts.copy:static: cp robots.txt sitemap.xml google*.html about.html privacy.html terms.html contact.html pages.css fonts.css favicon.svg og-image.png _headers _redirects dist/ && mkdir -p dist/.well-known && cp .well-known/security.txt dist/.well-known/ && mkdir -p dist/assets/fun-ui && cp assets/fun-ui/*.png dist/assets/fun-ui/ && mkdir -p dist/assets/fonts && cp assets/fonts/*.woff2 dist/assets/fonts/
scripts.build: npm run test:backend && webpack --mode production && npm run copy:static
